claim_boundary: Boundary Axiom B1 and its intrinsic action are a provisional freeze, not a P1 derivation. Exact intrinsic M4 Lorentz structure is obtained, while one-normalization coefficient locking, the shifted junction background, scalar potential, full spectrum, physical gauge interpretation, absolute units, fermions, and Standard Model closure remain open.
connection: A_mu remains intrinsic; only parent bundle representation and transition law are restricted
conservation: boundary diffeomorphism and gauge identities hold when the matching and bulk equations are imposed
metric: S_match=integral sqrt(-h) Lambda^{mu nu}(h_mu nu-iota^*g_mu nu)
overconstraint: no formal overconstraint: Lambda is eliminated between the intrinsic metric equation and bulk junction equation; compatible boundary data and the shifted background still must be solved
scalar: sigma_partial remains independent and is not set equal to the bulk singlet
